items.title: Traveler Checkout Clarity discovery
items.name: Traveler Checkout Clarity discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether clearer payment, cancellation, and confirmation-state explanations can improve conversion without increasing support burden.
items.opportunity: Clarify how much of traveler abandonment comes from policy and payment ambiguity versus property-price or relevance concerns.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to improve traveler booking confidence by clarifying cancellation terms, payment timing, and booking-state visibility across high-intent accommodation checkout flows.

riskFocus.question: Will travelers change booking behavior if policy and payment clarity improve?
riskFocus.hypothesis: High-intent travelers drop less when they understand exactly when they pay and what happens if plans change.

riskFocus.question: Can travelers understand the booking-state model without extra support?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Simpler confirmation and change-state messaging reduces post-booking confusion.

plannedActivities: Compare abandonment across pay-now, pay-later, and pay-at-property cohorts.
Test simplified booking confirmation and change-state prototypes.
Review support contacts linked to payment ambiguity.
items.decisionToMake: Decide whether to standardize payment and policy explanation patterns across property types before larger checkout redesign work.

items.title: Partner Visibility Control discovery
items.name: Partner Visibility Control discovery
items.summary: Discovery work is testing whether clearer visibility, promotion, and quality explanations help partners improve profitable occupancy rather than just chasing volume.
items.opportunity: Clarify where partners currently feel the marketplace is opaque and which commercial levers are trusted enough to scale.

linkedInitiatives.description: Focused investment to help accommodation partners understand and improve visibility, occupancy quality, and promotion tradeoffs without relying on opaque manual heuristics.

riskFocus.question: Will partners act differently if visibility drivers become clearer?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Partners will make better pricing and program decisions when visibility drivers are explained in partner language rather than algorithmic abstractions.

riskFocus.question: Can the marketplace expose more explanation without creating gaming or support load?
riskFocus.hypothesis: Explanation can increase trust without materially harming ranking-system resilience if presented as bounded guidance.

plannedActivities: Review partner support contacts about visibility and promotion complaints.
Prototype clearer commercial action guidance in partner dashboards.
Compare hotel and homes partner needs for visibility explanation depth.
items.decisionToMake: Decide which ranking and program factors should be made more explicit in partner tooling during Q2.
